hero.h1: Free AI Video Generators with No Watermark
hero.subheadline: This page compares AI video tools by their free-tier watermark policy. Tools are grouped into three categories: truly free (watermark-free exports by default), conditional free (watermark-free only within stated limits), and low-cost removal (free tier adds branding, but a cheap upgrade removes it). Each listing notes the free resolution, duration caps, credit allowances, and commercial-use constraints so you can judge the real value of "free."
definitionBullets: Truly Free: Free exports stay watermark-free without requiring an upgrade.
Conditional Free: Watermark-free only if you stay within specific duration, export-count, or usage limits.
Low-Cost Removal: The free tier adds branding, but a low-priced plan removes it.

criteria.title: Will the free export actually be watermark-free?
criteria.desc: FlexClip, Leonardo AI, Hailuo AI, and Jogg.ai all list their free exports without a watermark. Kapwing removes the watermark only on exports under 4 minutes, with a cap of 3 per month. The distinction matters for consistent output.

criteria.title: Count how many free videos you can realistically produce.
criteria.desc: Hailuo AI limits free generations to 5-second 720p clips. Jogg.ai caps the free tier at 10 lifetime credits. Leonardo AI runs on a daily token budget that depletes quickly. "Watermark-free" means little if you can only produce a handful of clips.

criteria.title: Verify the free export resolution.
criteria.desc: Most tools in the "Truly Free" group cap free output at 720p. If you need 1080p or higher, you will likely need a paid plan regardless of watermark policy.

criteria.title: Review commercial-use terms before publishing.
criteria.desc: Free tiers often carry commercial-use restrictions that are separate from watermark policy. Check the terms for each tool, especially if using stock assets, templates, or generated media in commercial content.

groups.groupSummary: These tools produce watermark-free exports on the free plan by default. The trade-off is typically lower resolution (720p), daily credit limits, or short clip duration — not forced branding. If clean output matters more than high resolution, these are the tools to start with.

tools.name: FlexClip
tools.reasonLine1: Browser-based editor with watermark-free exports on the free plan. Practical for quick edits with templates.
tools.mainTradeoff: Free plan limits access to stock assets and advanced libraries

tools.name: Leonardo AI
tools.reasonLine1: Watermark-free AI motion clips on the free tier, limited by a daily token budget.
tools.watermarkPolicy: Free generated clips presented without watermark
tools.mainTradeoff: Free outputs capped at 720p; daily token budget depletes quickly

tools.name: Hailuo AI
tools.reasonLine1: Watermark-free text-to-video clips with camera controls. Free generations are extremely short.
tools.watermarkPolicy: Free generated clips presented without watermark
tools.bestFor: Short text-to-video prompts with camera motion

tools.name: Jogg.ai
tools.reasonLine1: Free HD avatar exports without watermark, but the lifetime allowance is very small.
tools.watermarkPolicy: Free HD exports presented without watermark
tools.bestFor: Testing AI avatar videos before committing to a paid plan
tools.mainTradeoff: Free tier capped at 10 lifetime credits total

groups.groupSummary: These tools can export without a watermark on the free tier, but only if you stay within strict limits — export count, video duration, or specific template constraints. Exceed those limits and the watermark appears or you lose export access entirely.

tools.name: Kapwing
tools.reasonLine1: Watermark-free exports only on videos under 4 minutes, limited to 3 per month.
tools.watermarkPolicy: No watermark only on exports under 4 minutes
tools.bestFor: Quick social clips and light edits
tools.mainTradeoff: Longer exports add branding; free allowance is very small

groups.groupSummary: These tools keep a watermark on all free-tier exports. You need to upgrade to a paid plan — typically $10–29/mo — if clean exports are the goal. They suit users who want to test the tool's capabilities for free before committing to a subscription.

tools.name: Clipclip
tools.reasonLine1: Free tier includes a watermark on all exports. Upgrade required for clean output.
tools.mainTradeoff: Must upgrade for clean exports and better output quality

tools.name: Lumen5
tools.reasonLine1: Free blog-to-video exports carry Lumen5 branding. Paid plans remove it.
tools.watermarkPolicy: The free plan adds a watermark
tools.bestFor: Turning blog posts into simple social videos
tools.mainTradeoff: Removing branding requires a paid subscription
